examples: Sublingual gland sialolithiasis is rare and may be misdiagnosed as gland sialolithiasis, which is more common.
Objective To evaluate the value of high-frequency ultrasound in diagnosis of submandibular gland with sialolithiasis.
Method: Summarize the characters of treatment and diagnose of sialolithiasis by reviewing the literatures and report the clinical symptoms and therapy procedure of the case.
